import pandas as pd

def transform_dataframe(df):
    # Create a new dataframe with the desired structure
    new_df = pd.DataFrame(columns=['Time since operating room', 'Patient ID', 'age', 'sexuality', 'procedure type'])
    
    # Iterate through each unique Patient ID
    for patient_id in df['Patient ID'].unique():
        patient_data = df[df['Patient ID'] == patient_id]
        
        # Add rows for each time interval
        for i in range(1, 11):
            new_row = {
                'Time since operating room': f"{i} minute(s)",
                'Patient ID': patient_id,
                'age': patient_data['age'].iloc[0],
                'sexuality': patient_data['sexuality'].iloc[0],
                'procedure type': patient_data['procedure type'].iloc[0]
            }
            
            # Add the row to the new dataframe
            new_df = new_df.append(new_row, ignore_index=True)
    
    return new_df
